# Zaratük Consulting

> Zaratük Consulting builds custom Power BI visuals and connectors that help teams improve data quality, operational monitoring, LLM usage visibility, and reporting clarity inside Power BI.

Zaratük Consulting is a product-focused Power BI custom visual and custom connector developer. The company creates installable pbiviz and mez tools for analysts, BI developers, data engineers, IT operations teams, AI operations teams, and data governance teams that need clearer signals about the data behind reports.

Core positioning:
- Custom Power BI visuals built for better data decisions
- Power BI custom visuals for operational intelligence
- Power BI visuals that solve data quality and reporting problems
- Power BI custom connectors for LLM usage monitoring and token cost reporting
- Purpose-built pbiviz products for monitoring, validating, and explaining data assets

Primary product:
- Data Health Panel is a free Power BI custom visual that scores data health across completeness, freshness, uniqueness, and category validity. It shows a weighted 0-100 score, KPI tiles, and a plain-English diagnostic issue list directly inside Power BI reports.
- Pipeline Health Monitor is a free Power BI custom visual that monitors pipeline run health by showing latest status, duration, SLA health, anomaly warnings, and duration trends for operational datasets.
- LLM Usage Monitor is a free beta Power BI custom connector that brings organization-level LLM token usage, request volume, model consumption, and cost data into Power BI. It is installed as LLMUsageMonitor.mez in the Power BI Desktop Custom Connectors folder and supports OpenAI and Anthropic organization Admin API usage reporting. The LLMUsageConnector repository has an Aikido Security scan result showing 0 issues across monitored checks such as dependency monitoring, exposed secrets, license management, SAST, IaC, supply-chain malware, and GitHub access control.

Contact:
- Email: info@zaratuk.ca

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://zaratuk.com/): Overview of Zaratük Consulting and its focus on custom Power BI visuals for data quality, validation, and operational reporting.
- [Products](https://zaratuk.com/products/): Catalog of Power BI custom visual and connector products, including Data Health Panel, Pipeline Health Monitor, and LLM Usage Monitor.
- [About](https://zaratuk.com/about/): Company positioning around Power BI as an IT operational layer and custom visuals for operational intelligence.
- [Contact](https://zaratuk.com/contact/): Contact page for product questions, feedback, and custom visual suggestions.

## Products

- [Data Health Panel](https://zaratuk.com/products/data-health-panel/): Free Power BI custom visual for completeness, freshness, uniqueness, category validity, and diagnostic data quality issues.
- [Pipeline Health Monitor](https://zaratuk.com/products/pipeline-health-monitor/): Free Power BI custom visual for pipeline status, run duration, SLA health, basic anomalies, and duration trend monitoring.
- [LLM Usage Monitor](https://zaratuk.com/products/llm-usage-monitor/): Free beta Power BI custom connector for organization-level LLM token usage, cost, model consumption, and request reporting.
- [Data Health Panel documentation](https://zaratuk.com/docs/data-health-panel/): Installation, field roles, scoring logic, formatting controls, use cases, and AppSource-oriented validation notes.
- [LLM Usage Monitor documentation](https://zaratuk.com/docs/llm-usage-monitor/): Beta connector installation, custom connector folder setup, provider requirements, authentication notes, and exposed tables.

## Downloads

- [Data Health Panel pbiviz package](https://zaratuk.com/download/data-health-panel.pbiviz): Installable Power BI custom visual package.
- [Data Health Panel sample CSV](https://zaratuk.com/downloads/data-health-panel-sample.csv): Sample data for testing the visual in Power BI.
- [Pipeline Health Monitor pbiviz package](https://zaratuk.com/download/pipeline-health-monitor.pbiviz): Installable Power BI custom visual package.
- [Pipeline Health Monitor sample CSV](https://zaratuk.com/downloads/pipeline-runs.csv): Sample pipeline run data with SLA fields.
- [LLM Usage Monitor mez package](https://zaratuk.com/download/llm-usage-monitor.mez): Installable beta Power BI custom connector package.

- [Sitemap](https://zaratuk.com/sitemap-index.xml): XML sitemap for all indexable pages.
